_meta.purpose: Local queue.json backlog for unattended /sub queue runs. Improved with tighter polling, evidence archiving, and model allocation in launcher defaults.

model_strategy.quality: Queue runner inherits model from launcher defaults — per-issue specs can override.
model_strategy.optimization: drain_on_exit ensures no orphaned issues. max_concurrent_issues limits parallel cost.
model_strategy.token_saving: compact directive for all workers, low reasoning default — individual specs can escalate when needed.

improvements: Archive root set for audit trail across queue runs
Polling max_polls increased for practical batch sizes
compact shared_directive_mode reduces per-worker token overhead
